kw.name: Set Screenshot Directory
kw.doc: Sets the directory for captured screenshots.

test.name: Login Test

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Title Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current page title equals ``title``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'apitesteremail@gmail.com' into text field 'xpath=//input[@id="outlined-basic" and @type="text"]'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'APITestP@ss1' into text field 'xpath=//input[@id="outlined-adornment-password" and @type="password"]'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Reload Page
kw.doc: Simulates user reloading page.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: This test case verifies the login functionality of the application.

test.name: Logout Test

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Title Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current page title equals ``title``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'apitesteremail@gmail.com' into text field 'xpath=//input[@id="outlined-basic" and @type="text"]'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'APITestP@ss1' into text field 'xpath=//input[@id="outlined-adornment-password" and @type="password"]'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Reload Page
kw.doc: Simulates user reloading page.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: This test case verifies the logout functionality of the application.

test.name: Event Functions Test

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Title Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current page title equals ``title``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'apitesteremail@gmail.com' into text field 'xpath=//input[@id="outlined-basic" and @type="text"]'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'APITestP@ss1' into text field 'xpath=//input[@id="outlined-adornment-password" and @type="password"]'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Reload Page
kw.doc: Simulates user reloading page.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//button[@type="button" and @title="month view" and normalize-space(text())="month"]'.
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Replace String
kw.doc: Replaces ``search_for`` in the given ``string`` with ``replace_with``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Test Event Title' into text field 'xpath=//input[@id="outlined-basic" and @name="title"]'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Replace String
kw.doc: Replaces ``search_for`` in the given ``string`` with ``replace_with``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Test Event Description' into text field 'xpath=//textarea[@id="outlined-multiline-static"]'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Element Should Contain
kw.msg: Element 'xpath=//td[@role="gridcell" and @data-date="2025-04-29"]' contains text 'Test Event Title'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains text ``expected``.

kw.name: Replace String
kw.doc: Replaces ``search_for`` in the given ``string`` with ``replace_with``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//div[contains(@class, "fc-event-main") and contains(normalize-space(), "Test Event Title")]'.
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Replace String
kw.doc: Replaces ``search_for`` in the given ``string`` with ``replace_with``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Press Keys
kw.msg: Sending key(s) ('BACKSPACE',) to xpath=//input[@id="outlined-basic" and @name="title"] element.
Pressing special key BACKSPACE to element.
kw.doc: Simulates the user pressing key(s) to an element or on the active browser.

kw.name: Press Keys
kw.msg: Sending key(s) ('BACKSPACE',) to xpath=//input[@id="outlined-basic" and @name="title"] element.
Pressing special key BACKSPACE to element.
kw.doc: Simulates the user pressing key(s) to an element or on the active browser.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Updated Event Title' into text field 'xpath=//input[@id="outlined-basic" and @name="title"]'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.doc: Replaces ``search_for`` in the given ``string`` with ``replace_with``.

kw.msg: Element 'xpath=//td[@role="gridcell" and @data-date="2025-04-29"]' contains text 'Updated Event Title'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains text ``expected``.

kw.name: Replace String
kw.doc: Replaces ``search_for`` in the given ``string`` with ``replace_with``.

kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//div[contains(@class, "fc-event-main") and contains(normalize-space(), "Updated Event Title")]'.

kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Replace String
kw.msg: ${CONFIRM_DELETE_MODAL_XPATH} = xpath=//div[contains(@class, "MuiBox-root") and @tabindex="-1"][.//h6[normalize-space(.)='Are you sure you want to delete "Updated Event Title"?']]
kw.doc: Replaces ``search_for`` in the given ``string`` with ``replace_with``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Replace String
kw.doc: Replaces ``search_for`` in the given ``string`` with ``replace_with``.

kw.name: Element Should Not Contain
kw.msg: Element 'xpath=//td[@role="gridcell" and @data-date="2025-04-29"]' does not contain text 'Updated Event Title'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` does not contain text ``expected``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: This test case verifies the event CRUD functionality of the application.

test.name: Group Functions Test

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Title Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current page title equals ``title``.

kw.name: Login
Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'apitesteremail@gmail.com' into text field 'xpath=//input[@id="outlined-basic" and @type="text"]'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'APITestP@ss1' into text field 'xpath=//input[@id="outlined-adornment-password" and @type="password"]'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Reload Page
kw.doc: Simulates user reloading page.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.msg: The text of element 'xpath=//div[contains(@class, "MuiTypography-h6")]' should have been 'APITester' but it was ''.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.
kw.status: The text of element 'xpath=//div[contains(@class, "MuiTypography-h6")]' should have been 'APITester' but it was ''.
The text of element 'xpath=//div[contains(@class, "MuiTypography-h6")]' should have been 'APITester' but it was ''.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: This test case verifies the group CRUD functionality of the application.
test.status: The text of element 'xpath=//div[contains(@class, "MuiTypography-h6")]' should have been 'APITester' but it was ''.
